case_number: criminal transfer application in Sessions case No.4977 of 2022

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr.Tra.A.No.71 of 2024 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA No.10001/24 22.11.2024 Applicant present in person. Mr. Muhammad Ali Unar, DPG. ----------- O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant in person has filed this criminal transfer application in Sessions case No.4977 of 2022, under section 324, 109, 34 PPC, FIR No.79 of 2022 at P.S. Awami Colony on the ground that after prosecution side was closed and his statement u/s 342 Cr.P.C. was recorded, complainant moved an application to recall the witnesses, who had not identified him and that application has been allowed by the court. When confronted with the fact, whether he has challenged the order whereby such application has been allowed by the learned trial Court, he has replied in negative and states that he does not press this criminal transfer application and would challenge the same order before the relevant forum. Accordingly, this criminal transfer application in the above terms is disposed of as not pressed alongwith the listed application. 2. This criminal transfer application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Imran
